ab: Laqi ku seejiq Truku ka yaku, ga mniq Bsngan ka sapah nami.
ch: 我是太魯閣族的小孩。我們家住在富世玻士岸。
en: I am an Truku child.Our family lives in Bsngan.

ab: Rima hiyi ka ruwan sapah mu.
en: There are five people in our family.

ab: Niqan tru mnswayi ka sapah nami.
ch: 我們家有三個兄弟姊妹。
en: There are three brothers and sisters in our family.

ab: Niqan tama, bubu, qbsuran mu snaw ni qbsuran mu kuyuh.
ch: 我跟爸爸、媽媽、哥哥和姊姊住在一起。
en: I live with my father, mother, brother and sister.

ab: Ttakar bi ka tama mu, knsat qpahun na ka tama mu.
ch: 我的爸爸很高，我的爸爸是警察。
en: My father is tall and he is a policeman.

ab: Hlawax bi ka bubu mu, msapuh qpahun na ka bubu mu.
ch: 我的媽媽很瘦，我的媽媽是醫生。
en: My mother is thin and she is a doctor.

ab: Tghuy mnan mniq sapah rmngaw kari bubu ka tama mu.
ch: 爸爸在家會和我們說族語。
en: My father speaks the Truku language with us at home.

ab: Mseupu nami musa alang ka msangay rbagan.
en: We will all go back to the tribe during the summer vacation.

ab: Tghuy ku mnswayi mu mseupu nami qrak qpatur.
ch: 我和兄姊會一起抓青蛙。
en: My brother and sister and I will catch frogs together.

ab: Smkuxul ku kingal ruwan sapah mu.
en: I like our family very much.
